fields.name: id
fields.label: Id
fields.description: Provide an ID to enable deep linking to this component instance and for anchor navigation.

fields.name: customClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Provide a CSS class to apply custom styling to this component.

fields.name: homePagePath
fields.label: Home Page Path
fields.description: Sets an explicit root (home) page for the breadcrumb. When provided, the breadcrumb begins from this path.

fields.name: homeTitle
fields.label: Home Title
fields.description: Overrides the display label for the home breadcrumb item. If blank, the page title is used.

fields.name: enableBreadcrumb
fields.label: Enable Breadcrumb
fields.description: Toggles rendering of the breadcrumb trail. Uncheck to hide the component output while retaining configuration.

fields.name: enableHiddenItems
fields.label: Enable Hidden Items
fields.description: When enabled, includes pages marked as hidden in navigation within the breadcrumb trail.

fields.name: enableCurrentPage
fields.label: Enable Current Page
fields.description: Controls whether the current page appears as the last item in the breadcrumb.

fields.name: enableRedirectTitle
fields.label: Enable Redirect Title
fields.description: Uses the redirect target page title if the page redirects; otherwise uses the page's own title.
